summary: Created MPI-104: RunPod console link in Settings (deep-link to active Pod when connected, static pods list otherwise; shell.openExternal). App-only, no rebuild. Born from MPI-103 testing — RunPod bad-host stalls; link helps users self-diagnose. Handed off for pickup.

Implemented RunPod console link in Settings: <a> under the connect row (between status/connect hint and Delete-Pod-on-quit), styled like the existing referral link. href set live by _setConsoleLinkHref (called from _applyEngineStatus every status poll + at init): deep-links console.runpod.io/pods?id=<podId> when a Pod is tracked, else the static /pods list. Plain target=_blank -> main.js setWindowOpenHandler routes to shell.openExternal. App-only, no rebuild. AWAITING user in-app verify before done.

MPI-104 COMPLETE + accepted. RunPod console link shipped in Settings (between connect row and Delete-Pod-on-quit), live deep-link to active Pod / static pods list, opens via shell.openExternal. USER verified in-app (link visible + opens). App-only, no rebuild. Files: MpiSettings.js + .css.
Archived from done to tasks/_archived/MPI-104 (mpi-archive cleanup of oldest completed cards).
